200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Archer

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Once in a while, sets an Abyss Hound on the enemy with the least amount of health. The hound deals 75000 damage to the target and casts fear on him for 2 sec.

description 4/6

Once in a while, sets an Abyss Hound on the enemy with the least amount of health The hound deals 150000 damage to the target and casts fear on him for 2 sec. Once in a while, summons an Abyss War Hound to the battlefield (300000 health, 70000 damage per second).

description 6/6

Once in a while, sets an Abyss Hound on the enemy with the least amount of health. The hound deals 250000 damage to the target and casts fear on him for 2 sec. Once in a while, summons an Abyss War Hound to the battlefield (500000 health, 80000 damage per second). At the start of the battle, summons a Furious Abyss Hound (1000000 health, 100000 damage per second).


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

The target frightened by the Abyss Hound takes 30% more damage while fear is in effect.

description 4/6

The target frightened by the Abyss Hound takes 30% more damage while fear is in effect. When attacking, an Abyss War Hound has a 60% chance to deal an additional 75000 pure damage.

description 6/6

The target frightened by the Abyss Hound takes 30% more damage while fear is in effect. When attacking, an Abyss War Hound has a 60% chance to deal an additional 75000 pure damage. When Demon Hunter summons any Hound, the unit’s damage is increased by 20% for 8 sec. Up to 4 effects.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

Demon Hunter restores health equal to 50% of the damage dealt by the Abyss Hound.

description 4/6

Demon Hunter restores health equal to 50% of the damage dealt by the Abyss Hound. Abyss War Hound increases magic and physical armor of allies in a small radius around it by 15%. The effect is active as long as the Hound is alive.

description 6/6

Demon Hunter restores health equal to 50% of the damage dealt by the Abyss Hound. Abyss War Hound increases magic and physical armor of allies in a small radius around it by 15%. The effect is active as long as the Hound is alive. Ferocious Abyss Hound reduces all damage done to all allies by 15%. The effect is alive as long as the Hound is alive.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

When the Abyss Hound strikes an enemy with fear, it has a 33% chance to strike 2 nearest enemies with fear.

description 4/6

When the Abyss Hound strikes an enemy with fear, it has a 33% chance to strike 2 nearest enemies with fear. When the Abyss War Hound dies, all movement-restricting effects are removed from the Demon Hunter and they cannot be affected by those effects for 3 sec.

description 6/6

When the Abyss Hound strikes an enemy with fear, it has a 33% chance to strike 2 nearest enemies with fear. When the Abyss War Hound dies, all movement-restricting effects are removed from the Demon Hunter and they cannot be affected by those effects for 3 sec. The health and damage of all Hounds is increased by 30% of the Demon Hunter’s health and damage.

Materials

Devil Fish
Demon Heart

Dungeon chest

purchase in:
Arena battle

purchase in:
